use_cases: Animated pixel grid background for landing pages and hero sections
Dynamic generative art element for creative portfolios
Decorative particle effect background for web applications
Visual canvas animation for dev-tools and creator platforms
ai_summary: Canvas-based pixel grid animation component featuring individual pixel instances with randomized appearance timing, size variations, and shimmer effects. Each pixel animates independently with configurable speed, delay, and color properties, creating a dynamic generative visual suitable for decorative backgrounds or hero sections.
